meta.title: Achievements
meta.subtitle: Recognitions, milestones, and measurable accomplishments across academics and professional work
meta.description: A curated list of academic, professional, and technical achievements highlighting impact, growth, and recognition.

achievements.title: Namaste Node.js
achievements.description: Completed Namaste Node.js course covering Node.js fundamentals, Express.js, MongoDB & Mongoose, event-driven architecture, RESTful APIs, authentication & authorization, and production deployment strategies.

impact.summary: Strengthened backend development skills with Node.js and Express.js

custom.notes: Comprehensive Node.js and backend development certification.

achievements.title: Namaste JavaScript
achievements.description: Completed Namaste JavaScript course covering JavaScript fundamentals, JSON, Vanilla JavaScript, and Embedded JavaScript (EJS).

impact.summary: Solidified JavaScript fundamentals and front-end scripting

achievements.title: AWS Cloud Computing
achievements.description: Completed AWS Cloud Computing certification program at The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda, covering cloud concepts, AWS services, and deployment.

organization.name: The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda

impact.summary: Strengthened cloud fundamentals and AWS deployment knowledge

custom.notes: AWS Certificate.pdf — issued by MSU Baroda.

achievements.title: Android App Development Bootcamp 2021 - Build a portfolio!
achievements.description: Completed Udemy Android App Development Bootcamp 2021, building a portfolio of Android applications.

impact.summary: Built foundation in Android development and portfolio projects

achievements.title: Kotlin for Beginners: Learn Programming With Kotlin
achievements.description: Completed Udemy Kotlin for Beginners course, learning Kotlin programming fundamentals for Android development.

impact.summary: Learned Kotlin for Android and modern JVM development

achievements.title: Inter College Web Development Winner
achievements.description: Won Inter College Web Development competition. Biggest challenge was coding in notepad without internet access. Learned how to build a project under strict time constraints.

impact.summary: First place in inter-college web development competition

custom.notes: From education — Diploma period. Issued by GTU Ahmedabad.

achievements.title: NCC ex-cadet | RDC (Republic Day Camp) Delhi 2018 | PM (Prime Minister) Rally Delhi
achievements.description: Selected for RDC Delhi 2018 and PM Rally Delhi. Stayed with Indian Officers at Delhi, met Admiral Sunil Lanba (23rd Chief of the Naval Staff). Marched on CARIAPPA PARADE GROUND in Prime Minister Rally 2018 and met the Prime Minister of India. Represented Gujarat Directorate of NCC, 2 Gujarat Naval Unit NCC after 6 months of training.

organization.name: NCC (National Cadet Corps) Ministry of Defence India

impact.summary: National-level NCC recognition; represented Gujarat at RDC and PM Rally

custom.notes: From education — Baroda High School Alkapuri. Associated with Baroda High School Alkapuri.

achievements.title: Institute Topper (1st)
achievements.description: Secured first rank as Institute Topper during Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering at Gujarat Technological University. Achieved 10 SPI in Sem 5 and Sem 6.

impact.summary: Top academic performance in diploma program; 9.67 CGPA

custom.notes: From education.json — Diploma achievements: Institute Topper (1st), Sem 5th & 6th 10 SPI, Fireless Cooking Winner.

achievements.title: Gujarat Best Cadet
achievements.description: Awarded Gujarat Best Cadet in NCC. Highly involved in NCC activities (Indian Navy, RDC Delhi 2018, PM Rally). Head of Computer Department in BHS Alkapuri Higher Secondary Section. Secured 83% in 10th standard.

impact.summary: State-level NCC recognition; leadership and academic balance

custom.notes: From education.json — School achievements: Indian Navy NCC, RDC Delhi 2018, PM Rally, Gujarat Best Cadet, Head of Computer Dept.

achievements.title: First class with distinction (B.E. CSE)
achievements.description: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science & Engineering with strong academic performance. Applied theoretical concepts to real-world software systems. Focus on backend development, system design, databases, and scalable application architecture.

organization.name: The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda (MSU)

impact.summary: Strong academic performance while working on backend-focused projects

custom.notes: From education.json — Bachelor achievements and performance.
